subcodes.first_line: O people of Bahá and companions of the Crimson Ark! Hearken unto the call of God, the Lord of all humanity, which hath been raised from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل البهآء و اصحاب السفینه الحمرآء اسمعوا ندآء الله مولی الوری الذی ارتفع من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
